text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look at the time. I must set off for<n>training.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You speak to me, beautiful flowerpetals? Yes, I hear it clearly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look upon me, o gorgeous Overlord.<n>"I wish to
adorn you, o wondrous<n>Overlord."

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas... Forgive me, pretty flowers, for<n>enticing you
with my corruptible<n>charm!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Accept this compensation. I will offer<n>you my time,
through which we may<n>speak together!

text_block_list.name: Flower Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello! Which flowers are you<n>looking for
today?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Every single blossom in this<n>establishment,
naturally!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O skips her<n>training session to
speak with all the<n>flowers in the shop.
